info.name: John Karle Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for the John Karle backend.

request.description: Checks whether the root API process is running.
Checks the versioned API health route.
Access the Swagger UI documentation page.
Get the raw OpenAPI specification JSON.
Checks the root status route.
Checks the versioned API root route.
Access the Swagger UI documentation alias.
Get the raw OpenAPI specification JSON alias.
Creates a user.

response.name: Created

request.description: Authenticates a user.

response.name: Success

request.description: Refreshes the token pair.

response.name: Success

request.description: Sends a 6-digit reset code.

response.name: Success

request.description: Verifies the 6-digit code.
Resets the password.
Returns the current user profile.

response.name: Success

request.description: Invalidates the current refresh token version.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile fetched successfully.",

  }
}

request.description: Creates a family-member invitation. If the email belongs to an existing user, the relationship remains pending until acceptance.
Accepts a pending family-member invitation using the invitation token from email.
Lists only accepted family members for the authenticated user.
Lists pending family-member invitations for the authenticated invitee.

item.name: Accept Family Member Invitation In App

request.description: Accepts a pending family-member invitation as the authenticated invitee.

item.name: Decline Family Member Invitation In App

request.description: Declines a pending family-member invitation as the authenticated invitee.
Lists the authenticated user's memories. Optionally pass familyMemberUserId to read an accepted family member's memories.
Gets the authenticated user's timeline. Optionally pass familyMemberUserId to read an accepted family member's timeline.
Creates a memory vault item. Use either `file` once or repeated `files` fields. `journal` may omit files.
Fetches one memory vault item.
Updates metadata. If you include files, they replace the previous S3 file set.
Deletes a memory vault item and its S3 files.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Trusted Contact",
  "email": "{{trustedContactEmail}}",
  "phone": "+15551234567",
  "inactivityDays": 90,
  "accessScope": {
    "profile": true,
    "documents": true,
    "notes": true,
    "messages": false,
    "paymentInfo": false,
    "accountTransfer": false
  },
  "currentPassword": "{{userPassword}}"
}

request.description: Creates a pending trusted contact after password reauthentication.

response.name: Created

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's trusted contacts without any token hashes.

response.name: OK

request.description: Updates trusted contact metadata and scope after password reauthentication.

response.name: OK

request.description: Soft-removes a trusted contact and cancels active legacy requests for that contact.
Validates the invitation token and returns safe invitation metadata.

response.name: OK

request.description: Accepts the trusted contact invitation and invalidates the one-time token.
Declines the trusted contact invitation and invalidates the one-time token.
Enables or disables legacy access after password reauthentication.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Legacy access settings updated successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
    "name": "Demo User",
    "email": "demo.user@example.com",
    "role": "user",
    "isEmailVerified": false,
    "familyMembers": [],
    "preferences": {
      "notifications": true,
      "aiInsight": true,
      "darkMode": false,
      "anonymousAnalytics": true
    },
    "legacyAccessEnabled": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-06-09T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-09T00:20:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Lists legacy access requests for the authenticated trusted-contact account.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Legacy access requests fetched successfully.",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "legacy-request-id",
      "userId": "user-id",
      "trustedContactId": "trusted-contact-id",
      "trustedContact": {
        "id": "trusted-contact-id",
        "name": "Trusted Contact",
        "email": "trusted.contact@example.com",
        "status": "accepted",
        "accessScope": {
          "profile": true,
          "documents": false,
          "notes": true,
          "messages": false,
          "paymentInfo": false,
          "accountTransfer": false
        }
      },
      "status": "waiting_period",
      "triggeredAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z",
      "unlockAt": "2026-06-24T00:00:00.000Z",
      "expiresAt": "2026-07-24T00:00:00.000Z",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Claims a waiting-period request after unlockAt has passed.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Legacy access request claimed successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": "legacy-request-id",
    "userId": "user-id",
    "trustedContactId": "trusted-contact-id",
    "trustedContact": {
      "id": "trusted-contact-id",
      "name": "Trusted Contact",
      "email": "trusted.contact@example.com",
      "status": "accepted",
      "accessScope": {
        "profile": true,
        "documents": false,
        "notes": true,
        "messages": false,
        "paymentInfo": false,
        "accountTransfer": false
      }
    },
    "status": "approved",
    "triggeredAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z",
    "unlockAt": "2026-06-24T00:00:00.000Z",
    "expiresAt": "2026-07-24T00:00:00.000Z",
    "approvedAt": "2026-06-24T00:00:00.000Z",
    "createdAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-24T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Returns only the data allowed by the trusted-contact access scope. Passwords, tokens, credentials, and payment secrets are never returned.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Legacy access data fetched successfully.",
  "data": {
    "request": {
      "id": "legacy-request-id",
      "status": "approved",
      "triggeredAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z",
      "unlockAt": "2026-06-24T00:00:00.000Z",
      "approvedAt": "2026-06-24T12:00:00.000Z"
    },
    "owner": {
      "id": "user-id",
      "name": "Demo User",
      "email": "demo.user@example.com"
    },
    "accessScope": {
      "profile": true,
      "documents": false,
      "notes": true,
      "messages": false,
      "paymentInfo": false,
      "accountTransfer": false
    },
    "profile": {
      "id": "user-id",
      "name": "Demo User",
      "email": "demo.user@example.com",
      "role": "user",
      "isEmailVerified": true,
      "familyMembers": [],
      "preferences": {
        "notifications": true,
        "aiInsight": true,
        "darkMode": false,
        "anonymousAnalytics": true
      },
      "legacyAccessEnabled": true,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-09T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-10T00:00:00.000Z"
    },
    "notes": [
      {
        "id": "memory-id",
        "type": "journal",
        "title": "Legacy note",
        "narrative": "Visible note",
        "whoseMemoryIsThis": "Demo User",
        "files": [],
        "date": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z",
        "tags": [],
        "createdAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Cancels a waiting or approved legacy access request as the original user.

formdata.value: I cannot upload a file from the memory vault page.

request.description: Creates a report or feedback item for the authenticated user with up to 5 optional attachments.

response.name: Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Report created successfully.",
  "data": {
    "id": "{{reportFeedbackId}}",
    "userId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439013",
    "type": "problem",
    "category": "technical",
    "subject": "Cannot upload a file",
    "message": "I cannot upload a file from the memory vault page.",
    "priority": "medium",
    "status": "open",
    "attachments": [],
    "replies": [],
    "createdAt": "2026-06-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Lists the authenticated user's own reports with pagination and optional type/status/priority filters.
Gets a single report. Users can only access their own report.
Adds a follow-up reply to an owned report unless it has already been closed.
Lists the authenticated user's in-app notifications. Supports page and limit pagination, plus optional isRead, type, and priority filters.

response.name: OK

request.description: Returns the unread notification count for the authenticated user.
Marks a single owned notification as read.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Notification marked as read.",
  "data": {
    "id": "{{notificationId}}",
    "type": "system",
    "title": "Welcome",
    "message": "Your account is ready.",
    "isRead": true,
    "readAt": "2026-06-15T00:10:00.000Z",
    "priority": "normal",
    "createdAt": "2026-06-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-15T00:10:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Marks all owned unread notifications as read.
Deletes a single owned notification.
Returns admin dashboard metrics. totalActiveProfiles is currently based on users with a recorded lastActiveAt timestamp.
Lists users for admin management with pagination. Query params: page defaults to 1, limit defaults to 20 with a max of 100, search matches name/email/phone, and role filters by user role.

response.name: OK
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Users fetched successfully.",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Demo User",
      "email": "demo.user@example.com",
      "role": "user",
      "isEmailVerified": true,
      "familyMembers": [],
      "preferences": {
        "notifications": true,
        "aiInsight": true,
        "darkMode": false,
        "anonymousAnalytics": true
      },
      "legacyAccessEnabled": false,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-09T00:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-11T00:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 1,
    "totalPages": 1,
    "hasNextPage": false,
    "hasPrevPage": false
  }
}

request.description: Sends a private transactional email to each selected user individually.
Lists all reports for admins with pagination and filters for status, type, priority, userId, and search.
Gets a single report in admin context, including its user summary and replies.
Adds an admin reply and automatically moves an open report to in_progress.
Updates the report status. Allowed values are open, in_progress, resolved, and closed.
Creates in-app notifications for selected users, or use sendToAll=true to target all normal users.
Returns the authenticated admin or super-admin profile.

request.description: Updates the authenticated admin profile. Email is read-only. You may also upload a profilePicture file instead of using profileImage.

request.description: Changes the authenticated admin or super-admin password.
Returns the singleton static settings content.

response.name: OK

request.description: Updates singleton static settings content. Super-admin access required.

response.name: OK
